properties.body:
[Gulf of Finland] FINNISH NAV WARN 342/26
0600432 UTC OF JULY
FINNISH NAV WARN 342/26
SEA AREA OF KOTKA APPROACHES IS CLOSED
AREA IS LIMITED TO
KAUNISSAAREN SELKÄ IN WEST
HAMINA HARBOUR IN NORTH
TERRITORIAL SEA LIMIT IN EAST
TERRITORIAL SEA LIMIT IN SOUTH
FURTHER INFORMATION FROM KOTKA VTS ON VHF CHANNEL 67
